infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: PPL Tracker reads your workouts and body metrics to keep your progress in sync.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: PPL Tracker writes your workouts, weight, and body fat to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take progress photos to track your physique over time.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Choose photos from your library for progress tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Save progress photos to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PPL Tracker to access your camera for progress photos.
